item_titles: [AINews] Black Forest Labs FLUX 3 - Multimodal Flow Models that beat Seedance 2.0, Gemini Omni and Grok Imagine, and FLUX-mimic video-action robotics model
Flux 3 generates videos with native audio up to 20 seconds long, a first for Black Forest Labs
Flux 3: From AI image generation to visual intelligence
clusters.summary: Black Forest Labs发布了FLUX 3多模态基础模型，该模型可生成带原生音频的视频，在多项基准测试中击败了竞争对手。
clusters.title: Black Forest Labs发布FLUX 3多模态模型

item_titles: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
ChatGPT will give you worse health advice if you don't pay
Launching Health in ChatGPT
clusters.summary: OpenAI正式向美国用户推出“Health in ChatGPT”功能，允许用户连接Apple Health等医疗和健康应用数据以获取个性化健康建议。
clusters.title: OpenAI面向美国用户推出ChatGPT健康功能

item_titles: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
Cisco bets its small open cybersecurity models can outperform GPT-5.5 at vulnerability detection for a fraction of the cost
clusters.summary: 主流AI模型的安全护栏正在阻碍网络安全研究员寻找漏洞，而思科等公司则推出了成本更低、限制更少的专用网络安全AI模型。
clusters.title: AI安全护栏对网络安全研究的影响

item_titles: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
Anthropic will deploy 2 gigawatts of AMD GPUs for Claude in a deal worth up to $5 billion
clusters.summary: AMD推出Helios AI机架级系统，并与Anthropic达成高达50亿美元的合作协议，加速挑战Nvidia在AI芯片领域的主导地位。
clusters.title: AMD大举进军AI芯片市场，挑战Nvidia

item_titles: Codex Slides: open-source AI slide studio powered by Codex. Prompt, repo to deck

clusters.title: Codex Slides：开源AI幻灯片制作工具

item_titles: Inside the Model Factory — Eiso Kant, Poolside AI
Poolside's Laguna S 2.1 is a small open-weight coding model that punches well above its size
[AINews] "Laguna S 2.1 Released: Cheaper than Deepseek v4 Flash, Better than V4 Pro"
clusters.summary: AI初创公司Poolside发布了开源编程模型Laguna S 2.1，该模型以较小的参数量实现了超越大型模型的编程能力。
clusters.title: Poolside发布Laguna S 2.1编程模型

item_titles: China's All-Out Push to Catch Up with American AI Chips

clusters.title: 中国全力追赶美国AI芯片
